Population Transfer Types Tracks Space Guild civilian transport between colonies Source: docs/specs/economy.md Section 3.7, config/population.toml

Imports

../../common/types/core

Types

PopulationInTransit = object
  id*: string
  houseId*: HouseId
  sourceSystem*: SystemId
  destSystem*: SystemId
  ptuAmount*: int
  costPaid*: int
  arrivalTurn*: int
A population transfer in progress via Space Guild Starliner Source   Edit   
PopulationTransferConfig = object
  soulsPerPtu*: int
  ptuSizeMillions*: float
  edenCost*: int
  lushCost*: int
  benignCost*: int
  harshCost*: int
  hostileCost*: int
  desolateCost*: int
  extremeCost*: int
  turnsPerJump*: int
  minimumTurns*: int
  costIncreasePerJump*: float
  minPtuTransfer*: int
  minSourcePuRemaining*: int
  maxConcurrentTransfers*: int
  sourceConqueredBehavior*: string
  destConqueredBehavior*: string
  destBlockadedBehavior*: string
  minTreasuryForTransfer*: int
  minSourcePopulation*: int
  maxDestPopulation*: int
  recentColonyAgeTurns*: int
  ptuPerTransfer*: int
  minEconomicFocus*: float
  minExpansionDrive*: float
Configuration loaded from config/population.toml Source   Edit   
TransferStatus {.pure.} = enum
  InTransit, Arrived, Lost, Returned
Current state of a population transfer Source   Edit  

Vars

globalPopulationConfig: PopulationTransferConfig
